title: Pricing Section Component
content:
The `PricingSection` component displays a pricing table with different tiers of service. It includes a `PricingCard` component for each tier and a `ContactModal` for enterprise inquiries. ## Key Exports * `PricingSection()`: The main component that renders the pricing table. ## `PricingCard` Component This component renders an individual pricing tier card. ### Props * `tier`: An object of type `TierConfig` defining the properties of the pricing tier (name, price, features, highlighted status, etc.). ### Key Functionality * **`handleUpgrade()`**: Handles the logic for initiating a checkout process for paid tiers or opening the contact modal for the enterprise tier. * Displays tier name, pricing (including custom and free options), and limits. * Lists features associated with each tier using checkmarks. * Provides a call-to-action button (e.g., 'Get started', 'Contact us'). ## `ContactModal` Component This component renders a modal for users to contact for enterprise plans. ### Props * `onClose`: A function to call when the modal should be closed. ### Key Functionality * Manages form state for name, email, company, and message. * Handles form submission, sending data to `/api/billing/contact`. * Displays loading indicators, success messages, and error messages. ## Usage Example ```tsx import { PricingSection } from '@/components/ui/pricing-section'; function Page() { return (
{/* Other page content */} {/* More page content */}
); } export default Page; ``` This component is designed to be placed within a page or a larger layout component to display the pricing structure of the application.
